# LLMs.txt for Besiktas City Guide
# Purpose: Provide a clear, crawlable index for AI systems.

User-agent: *
Allow: /

Site: https://best5.com.tr
Sitemap: https://best5.com.tr/sitemap.xml

# Key entry points (Arabic + English)
Home (AR): https://best5.com.tr/ar
Home (EN): https://best5.com.tr/en
Blog (AR): https://best5.com.tr/ar/blog
Blog (EN): https://best5.com.tr/en/blog

# Static pages
Privacy (AR): https://best5.com.tr/ar/privacy
Privacy (EN): https://best5.com.tr/en/privacy
Contact (AR): https://best5.com.tr/ar/contact
Contact (EN): https://best5.com.tr/en/contact
Advertise (AR): https://best5.com.tr/ar/advertise
Advertise (EN): https://best5.com.tr/en/advertise
Terms (AR): https://best5.com.tr/ar/terms
Terms (EN): https://best5.com.tr/en/terms
Cookies (AR): https://best5.com.tr/ar/cookies
Cookies (EN): https://best5.com.tr/en/cookies
FAQ (AR): https://best5.com.tr/ar/faq
FAQ (EN): https://best5.com.tr/en/faq

# Notes
# - Articles are listed in the sitemap and under /{lang}/blog
# - Categories are listed in the sitemap under /{lang}/category/{slug}
